title: Google Mod
description: Adds Google’s Logos into Minecraft. It also adds armors and weapon made from Google’s Logos.
body:
# Adds Google’s Logos into Minecraft
Google Mod is a fan-made Minecraft mod that brings colorful, Google-inspired creativity into the game. It is not affiliated with or endorsed by Google LLC. This mod introduces new resources, tools and more.

At the heart of Google Mod are the Google Gems, obtained by mining Google Ore underground. Each ore drop provides one of seven unique gems Google, YouTube, Maps, Drive, Gmail, Chrome, and Translate Gems. These gems serve as valuable resources used to craft powerful items, giving players the tools and gear needed to explore, build, and fight more effectively.

The centerpiece of the mod is the Google Staff, a versatile tool that can instantly mine blocks and also function as a weapon, combining utility and combat power in a single item. The Google Armor Set grants special effects when worn, and the Google Amulet provides passive buffs simply by being in the player’s inventory.

All of these items are crafted using the Google Crafting Table, which features a 9×9 crafting grid for complex, large-scale recipes. A built-in recipe guide helps players manage the new crafting system and unlock the full potential of Google Gems.

![All the new Items and Blocks the Mods adds](https://i.imgur.com/EBW2S2n.jpeg)
